notes: PRs #487 + #488 + #489 merged (Stages 0-3). Stage 4 BUILT on this branch: phone-first delivery of Stage 3 proposals. New flag isScoutDeliveryEnabled() (SCOUT_DELIVERY_ENABLED, requires Scout master flag; default off). lib/scout/sms.ts = Twilio SMS adapter (test-safe by default; live only on Vercel prod with all TWILIO_* secrets). lib/scout/delivery.ts = phone-first fan-out (SMS nudge + deep link, then Slack/email carry the full review-gated artifact); never auto-sends to a third party; each channel self-skips when its owner-gated target env is unset. app/api/cron/scout/deliver/route.ts = owner-triggered (CRON_SECRET bearer; not a scheduled vercel.json cron), inert unless flag on. Proof: 19 new mocked tests (delivery + sms, no paid/network calls) + full scout suite 52 + typecheck + lint(0) + gate:continuity + build. Activation remaining (owner-gated): TWILIO_* secrets + SCOUT_DELIVERY_ENABLED + SCOUT_DELIVERY_SMS_TO/EMAIL_TO + the Stage 1-3 Voyage/SCOUT_*/ALLOW_PAID_LLM flags. Next seam: Stage 5 (hardening: budgets, dedup, delta re-index, fixture tests).
